name: job-hunter-linkedin-email-parser
notes:
FR10 + FR11 + NFR12: LinkedIn ingest is email-parse ONLY. This flow MUST NOT fetch any linkedin.com URL. Site crawling is forbidden — ToS landmine and account-suspension risk against the author's income-bearing LinkedIn account. The IMAP inbox used must be a dedicated Gmail account separate from the author's primary LinkedIn-registered email, so the polling credentials are isolated from anything tied to the author's LinkedIn login.

Contract: docs/n8n-contract.md. Required env vars: INGEST_BASE_URL, INGEST_SHARED_TOKEN, IMAP_HOST, IMAP_USER, IMAP_PASSWORD, IMAP_PORT. Hosting-agnostic: uses only IMAP Email Read + Function + HTTP Request + IF nodes — no Execute Command, no browser-automation node, no filesystem-only node. Source field: 'linkedin_email'. Dedup: SHA-256 hash of the RFC 5322 Message-ID (linkedin_email.seen_message_ids) AND SHA-256 hash of each extracted job URL (linkedin_email.seen_job_urls); both recorded only on a 2xx response from /api/paste so non-2xx retries on the next IMAP poll.
